## Why

<!-- Problem or motivation. What pain point or opportunity drove this change? -->

## What changed

<!-- Brief summary of the approach. Link to relevant code/sections if helpful. -->

## Testing

<!-- How was this verified? Unit tests, integration tests, manual steps, before/after output. Do not list linting (that is a given). -->

## Tradeoffs and alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you weigh? Why did you pick this one? Even one sentence is enough for small PRs. -->

## Impact

<!-- At least one concrete number where possible: latency, % of requests covered, users affected, time saved, error rate, etc. If genuinely unknown, say so. -->

## Rollout

<!-- Feature flag, monitoring/alert to watch, rollback plan. For dotfiles-style repos this can be "N/A - local change only". -->
